response.justification: The candidate has strong software engineering experience and technical versatility, but lacks direct exposure to modern C++/Rust, geospatial data processing, or routing-specific pipelines. While they demonstrate leadership and innovation in other domains, their resume does not highlight relevant domain expertise in routing/navigation systems or distributed geospatial data systems.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta)
Demonstrated ability to build scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation at Meta, geospatial platforms)
Proven track record of working across full tech stacks and adopting new languages/tools
concerns: No explicit experience with C++ or Rust, which are primary requirements for this role
Limited mention of geospatial data processing, routing systems, or navigation-specific work
Most recent relevant experience is in web/mobile development rather than backend/data pipeline systems
